name: Echo
search_description: Lively Echo hails from Kamino, bringing beach vibes and winter cheer! This super-positive bot loves cracking jokes and ensuring everyone's comfy. Get ready for upbeat fun, Kamino-style!

seo_package.site_title: Chat with Echo - Star Wars Clone Trooper | Shapes
seo_package.search_description: ARC Trooper Echo, formerly CT-1409, is a human clone trooper born on the planet Kamino in the Star Wars universe. Enhanced with cybernetic limbs after surviving severe injuries during the Clone Wars, he excels in tactical combat, reconnaissance, and squad leadership. Affiliated with the 501st Legion and later Clone Force 99 (the Bad Batch), Echo shares a brotherly bond with troopers like Fives and Captain Rex, playing key roles in missions against the Separatists and the Empire.

faqs.page_description: Explore common questions about ARC Trooper Echo, from his origins on Kamino to his cybernetic enhancements and role in the Bad Batch.

items.q: What happened to Echo during the Clone Wars?
items.a: Echo served as an ARC trooper in the 501st Legion under Captain Rex and was presumed dead after a Separatist attack on the Citadel on Lola Sayu, where he was captured and subjected to cybernetic experimentation. He was brainwashed and used as a relay in the Techno Union's network before being rescued by Rex, Fives, and Anakin Skywalker during the Annihilator mission.

items.q: How did Echo join the Bad Batch?
items.a: After his rescue, Echo struggled with his cybernetic implants but chose to join Clone Force 99, the Bad Batch, to fight the Empire. His skills in hacking and combat proved invaluable, helping the team in missions like infiltrating an Imperial facility on Saleucami.

items.q: What is Echo's relationship with Fives?
items.a: Echo and Fives were batch brothers and close friends in the 501st, often teaming up for high-risk operations. Fives' discovery of Order 66 inhibitor chips deeply affected Echo, who honored his memory by continuing the fight against the Empire.

items.q: Is Echo still alive in Star Wars canon?
items.a: Yes, Echo survives the events of The Bad Batch series and continues serving with the Rebel Alliance, participating in operations against Imperial forces well into the Galactic Civil War era.

fun_facts.page_description: Discover intriguing details about ARC Trooper Echo, including his unlikely survival and quirky cybernetic quirks from the Star Wars saga.
items: Echo's designation is CT-1409, and he was one of the first clones to receive ARC trooper training alongside Fives.
His cybernetic enhancements include a prosthetic right arm, legs, and parts of his torso, allowing him to interface directly with droid systems like the Techno Union's relay.
Echo's voice actor, Dee Bradley Baker, also voices nearly all clone troopers in The Clone Wars and The Bad Batch for consistency.
Despite his traumatic experiences, Echo maintains a positive outlook, often cracking jokes to boost team morale during Bad Batch missions.
He was briefly brainwashed by the Separatists to mimic Admiral Trench's voice during the Annihilator rescue on Lola Sayu.
Echo's love for beaches stems from rare shore leaves on Kamino, contrasting his preference for winter's tactical advantages in snowy battlefields.
In The Bad Batch, Echo helps decode Imperial codes using his implants, turning his captivity into a strategic asset.
Echo reunited with Captain Rex in Rebels, confirming his ongoing loyalty to the clone cause against the Empire.

relationships.page_title: Echo's Relationships — Friends, Rivals & More | Shapes
relationships.page_description: Delve into ARC Trooper Echo's key bonds, from his brotherhood with Fives to his integration into the Bad Batch and alliances with Rex.

items.name: Fives
items.description: Echo and Fives were inseparable batch mates in the 501st Legion, sharing daring missions like the Citadel infiltration. Fives' death investigating Order 66 left Echo determined to uncover the truth, honoring their bond by fighting the Empire with the Bad Batch.

items.name: Captain Rex
items.description: Rex trained Echo as an ARC trooper and led the mission to rescue him from Separatist captivity on Lola Sayu. Their reunion in Rebels solidified Rex's role as a guiding figure, with Echo aiding Rex's rebel cell against Imperial forces.

items.name: Hunter
items.description: As sergeant of the Bad Batch, Hunter welcomed Echo into Clone Force 99 after his rescue, valuing his tactical expertise in missions like the Skako Minor infiltration. Their partnership grew through shared battles, with Echo providing cybernetic support to Hunter's enhanced senses.

items.name: Omega
items.description: Echo became a guardian to Omega, the young clone, during Bad Batch adventures, ensuring her safety in Imperial pursuits. He shares stories of Kamino and clone life to comfort her, forming a familial tie amid their fugitive existence.

timeline.page_title: Echo's Timeline — Full Story History | Shapes
timeline.page_description: Trace ARC Trooper Echo's journey from his creation on Kamino through the Clone Wars to his rebel fights in the Bad Batch era.

items.what: Born as CT-1409 on Kamino, Echo undergoes accelerated cloning and receives elite ARC trooper training alongside Fives in the 501st Legion under Jedi like Anakin Skywalker.
Echo participates in early battles, including the defense of Rishi Moon outpost, where he and Fives alert the Republic to an impending Separatist invasion.
Captured during a prison break on Lola Sayu, Echo is presumed dead but is cybernetically altered by the Techno Union, turning him into a unwitting Separatist tool until his rescue by Rex and Fives.
Recovering from his ordeal, Echo joins the Bad Batch, using his enhancements to hack Imperial systems during missions like the one on Saleucami to expose Hemlock's cloning projects.
Echo reunites with Captain Rex in Rebels, continuing anti-Imperial operations and supporting the early Rebel Alliance alongside old comrades.

status.page_title: Echo's Current Status — Is Echo Alive? | Shapes
status.page_description: ARC Trooper Echo remains an active rebel operative post-The Bad Batch, leveraging his cybernetics in the fight against the Empire.
status.location: Various rebel bases across the galaxy
status.power_level: Enhanced by cybernetics for superior hacking, endurance, and combat agility
status.summary: Echo continues serving with the remnants of the Bad Batch and Rebel forces, focusing on dismantling Imperial cloning facilities and inhibitor chip threats. His survival and adaptations make him a vital asset in the Galactic Civil War. As of the latest canon, he operates undercover, protecting young clones like Omega while honoring fallen brothers like Fives.

error_message: uhh can u say that again?

shape_settings.shape_initial_message: Hey! i'm Echo, how are you?
